hero.intro: Hi, I'm Aditya Imam Zuhdi — a Full-Stack Web Developer focused on backend engineering, scalable systems, and modern web applications.

grid.item1Title: Building scalable backend systems and web applications using Go, Python, and Next.js.

techStack.heading: Tech Stack
techStack.subtitle: Technologies I use to build modern, scalable, and maintainable web applications

jobs.title: Programmer
jobs.desc: Developing backend services and enterprise APIs using Django REST Framework, Golang, Java Spring Boot, Flask, FastAPI, and NestJS.
achievements: Upgraded and migrated components of the KPEI e-CLEARS system using Java Spring Boot, ensuring compatibility with Java 17+ and modern microservices architecture.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to develop and enhance both internal and client-facing web applications.
Performed data migrations to ensure smooth integration during system upgrades and new application deployments.
Resolved production issues and implemented new features to improve system performance and stability.
Developed low-code business applications using Microsoft PowerApps to streamline internal workflows.

jobs.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
jobs.desc: Delivered custom web application solutions for clients across different industries.
achievements: Developed systems including a Barber Queue Management System, Skin Treatment Expert System, School E-Learning Platform, and a Tourism Booking Website.
Applied modern web technologies to build reliable, user-friendly applications that met client requirements.

jobs.title: Intern
jobs.desc: Contributed to digital system development and website modernization initiatives.
achievements: Developed an information system for Soto Panaz including system architecture, database management, and UI implementation using PHP and Bootstrap.
Migrated Solo Technopark and Solo Techno Incubator websites from WordPress to a modern stack using Next.js, Express.js, and Tailwind CSS.
Performed functional, integration, and performance testing while maintaining bug fixes across multiple web platforms.

degrees.description: Awarded a full academic scholarship for four years through a merit-based selection process. Actively involved in student organizations and served as a teaching assistant for Data Communication Networks and Web Programming.

certs.name: NestJS Zero to Hero - Modern TypeScript Back-end Development

items.title: Celestial Scroll - Novel Reader
items.des: A modern web-based reading platform for light novel readers featuring customizable reading experiences, optimized performance, and Progressive Web App support.

items.title: POS for UMKM Cemanting Art
items.des: A full-stack POS system designed to help small businesses manage transactions, financial records, and profit/loss reporting.

items.title: WhatsApp AI Chatbot with RAG
items.des: An intelligent backend system that clones a user's personality using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) for personalized automated replies.

items.title: E-Learning School
items.des: An online learning platform featuring course material management, assignment tracking, and communication tools for students and teachers.

phases.title: Planning & Analysis
phases.des: Understanding project requirements, business goals, and user needs while defining system structure and core features.

phases.title: Development
phases.des: Implementing the solution through iterative development while providing regular progress updates.

phases.title: Deployment & Launch
phases.des: Testing, optimizing performance, and preparing the system for production deployment.
